title: Audience Challenge Game
genericDescription: Confront audience assumptions; design respectful friction; measure interpretation.
specificDescription: Build a game that asks the intended audience to reconsider a habit, belief, expectation, genre convention, or AI interaction pattern. Conduct at least three targeted playtests.
gradingRubric: 30 pts audience challenge design; 20 pts respectful friction; 20 pts playtest insight; 15 pts game completeness; 15 pts notes.
